body: PT Lippo Cikarang TBK, a real estate developer, reported a net profit of IDR 66 billion in the first semester of 2024, a 9.5% decrease year-on-year, despite a 19.6% increase in revenue to IDR 691 billion, driven by strong pre-sales figures of IDR 741 billion, which accounts for 52% of the company's 2024 target. The company's management plans to introduce new products in the next quarter to meet market demand and ensure timely handovers to consumers.
title: Lippo Cikarang's Net Profit Drops 9.5% in First Semester 2024 Despite 19.6% Revenue Growth
